title: Add web UI to display Android InstaNotificationService auto-reply snippet

requirements.text: Create a frontend page that displays the provided Android Manifest service declaration and the provided Kotlin `InstaNotificationService : NotificationListenerService` code as formatted, syntax-highlighted code blocks, including a one-click "Copy" button for each snippet.
acceptanceCriteria: The page shows two clearly labeled sections: one for the AndroidManifest.xml snippet and one for the Kotlin service class snippet.
Each snippet is rendered in a monospace code block with preserved whitespace/indentation.
Each snippet has a "Copy" control that copies the exact snippet text to the clipboard.
All user-facing labels and helper text are in English.

requirements.text: Apply a coherent visual theme across the page (colors, typography, spacing, and component styling) suitable for a developer-focused code snippet viewer, avoiding blue/purple as primary brand colors.

quotes: Use English for any user-facing text in the build request.

acceptanceCriteria: The UI uses a consistent, developer-oriented aesthetic (e.g., neutral/dark or warm monochrome) applied to headers, backgrounds, code blocks, and buttons.
Theme is applied consistently across the page layout and interactive elements.

constraints: Do not implement Android/NotificationListenerService functionality inside this Internet Computer app; only present the provided snippets in the web UI.
Use English for any user-facing text.
nonGoals: Building an actual Android APK or integrating with Android notification APIs.
Sending real Instagram replies or interacting with Instagram services.

preferencesToAdd: Use English for any user-facing text.
